channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: You can now choose between speed and quality for Imagine. Professional mode is coming later this mon...
item.description: You can now choose between speed and quality for Imagine. Professional mode is coming later this month.

item.title: @elonmusk: LIVE: Agency leaders answer media questions and provide updates on our Artemis II mission around the...
item.description: LIVE: Agency leaders answer media questions and provide updates on our Artemis II mission around the Moon.xcancel.com/i/broadcasts/1RKjpzMne…

item.title: @elonmusk: The easiest way to see who in government is committing fraud is to ask them all to cut costs by 10% ...
item.description: The easiest way to see who in government is committing fraud is to ask them all to cut costs by 10% and explain how they’re doing it The one who says “that's impossible” is the one committing fraud

item.title: @elonmusk: The witch king has entered Minas Tirith. He is now a Gondorian citizen with full rights and benefits
item.description: The witch king has entered Minas Tirith. He is now a Gondorian citizen with full rights and benefits

item.title: @elonmusk: The American economy does not work the way we were taught. You pay taxes, you pay health insurance p...
item.description: The American economy does not work the way we were taught. You pay taxes, you pay health insurance premiums, but where does the money go? A lot of it goes to fraud, politics, illegal immigrants, and corporations that do nothing for you. The system is rigged.

item.title: @elonmusk: I made a full anime music video using nothing but Grok Imagine.@elonmuskhas built one of the most po...
item.description: I made a full anime music video using nothing but Grok Imagine.@elonmuskhas built one of the most powerful tools in human history for content creators. Your only limit is your own imagination. ✨

item.title: @elonmusk: A NYC school teacher has a GREAT idea for billionaires leaving New York. 🤣🙄 He suggests that if the ...
item.description: A NYC school teacher has a GREAT idea for billionaires leaving New York. 🤣🙄 He suggests that if the billion dollar companies leave then the regular folks should just take over their businesses. Journalist: “What do you say to the folks who say, if you tax millionaires, they're going to leave the city and the top 1% pays 40% of the taxes in the city. What happens if they leave? What's your response?” NYC Teacher: “We should take their business and we run it for the city ourselves.” 🤡 Journalist: “They take their business to Florida, you feel like you can keep it here?” NYC Teacher: “They can't leave the building. They can't just bring their whole entire workforce to Florida. Right? They can't bring all of the resources that they have to build the business here to Florida. Thats where you would say we're building a real movement, right?” “To stop that, we’d make it illegal for them to actually leave. We would find them to hell if they're gonna try to abandon their property here. Because clearly people do need to work, right? People do need to make a living.” Are they really all this stupid?? Follow:@RealJessica

item.title: @elonmusk: The new “Quality Mode” in Grok Imagine is insane. 🔥 The image quality jump is massive — sharper, mor...
item.description: The new “Quality Mode” in Grok Imagine is insane. 🔥 The image quality jump is massive — sharper, more realistic, next-level detail. Update your app and try it yourself.

item.title: @elonmusk: Parenting tips from the First Lady of California. Just think, if Newsom becomes President, maybe the...
item.description: Parenting tips from the First Lady of California. Just think, if Newsom becomes President, maybe the country will get a "boys with dolls" day.

item.title: @elonmusk: I once reported on how great Wikipedia was. Now, it’s FULL of propaganda. That’s a big problem becau...
item.description: I once reported on how great Wikipedia was. Now, it’s FULL of propaganda. That’s a big problem because its bad information corrupts AI and search results:@npovmedia@AshleyRindsberg

item.title: @elonmusk: South Africa has extremely racist laws
item.description: South Africa has extremely racist laws

item.title: @elonmusk: I got suspended on Old Twitter for posting this cartoon.
